texto: Unlike Kim Cardassian or Donald Trump, Montaigne regarded the inward glance as an adventure in self-effacement not self infatuation. He was a charming and perceptive critic of his own foibles, especially alert to his weakness for inconsistency.
explicacao: Citação de Danny Heitman sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Unlike Kim Cardassian or Donald Trump, Montaigne regarded the inward glance as an adventure in se…” articula autoestima, humility, modesty em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como modesty.
